absorption: Significant BID absorption observed on the footprint chart at the Value Area Low (VAL), preventing further price decline.
dom_observation: Large stacked bids are visible below the current price (e.g., 80 lots at 60450), acting as support. Ask side shows resistance starting around 60670.
reasoning: Fiyat, kilit destek seviyesi olan VAL'de alıcı absorpsiyonu ve 'bid back' paterni göstererek düşüşü reddediyor.
